name: Sauce Pecandine for Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, heat the butter until very hot but not brown.
2. Add the pecans and stir until the pecans turn slightly darker brown.
3. Quickly add vinegar. The sauce will foam up. Stir quickly and spoon over hot cooked asparagus, ensuring that nuts are distributed evenly. Serve immediately.
